title: Accurate Totem
body:
Bring new life to your Totem of Undying with this clean and realistic redesign! This texture pack gives your totem stunning white-and-blue angelic wings, making it look more authentic, elegant, and powerful than ever before.

Perfect for players who love a refined aesthetic or want their totem to truly feel like a symbol of protection and rebirth. Subtle yet eye-catching — once you use it, the default totem will feel plain!

✅ Works seamlessly with all versions supporting custom textures

✅ Lightweight and performance-friendly

✅ Pairs beautifully with fantasy or realistic packs

## Download now and make every save from death look divine!
